claim_gate.reason: Exact witness paths explain finite bounded-list failure, but LLL-dependent coordinate growth still needs a source theorem and does not constrain different affine decoders.

falsifiers_triggered: Every witness coordinate vector and nearest-plane replay is exact rational/integer arithmetic.
Targets are independent uniform and legality is determined only after sampling.
Witness truncation is explicit and excluded from witness-complete conclusions.
One-step tree escape does not rule out larger offsets, growing depth, or another affine decoder.
Finite deviation trends are not promoted to source-probability bounds.

geometry_contract.claim_rule: finite deviation growth or tree escape is not an asymptotic source bound
geometry_contract.coordinate_map: solve each witness lattice point exactly in the LLL-reduced marker-zero row basis
geometry_contract.list_equivalence: one-step tree depth k iff all offsets have magnitude <=1 and at most k are nonzero
geometry_contract.path_replay: use true later coefficients when recomputing every nearest-plane rounding decision
geometry_contract.source: independent uniform labels and target with exact post-sampling legality and witness enumeration

summary: Profiled exact nearest-plane paths for 19 complete legal trials through n=36; tail depth-two standard/carry predictions=0/0 over 3 trials, tree escapes=0/0; no asymptotic source theorem.
